title: Does AI actually trade (agent) or is it more rules based?
author: jp1261987
selftext:
Trying to decide best way to structure:

I feel like a bit of a hybrid situation makes most sense:

A market watcher and signal engine that watches for strategies and calculates various indicators and watches the news.

Then hands all that data off to an AI with specific prompts. But the question is does the AI actually trade or does it recommend?

Ideals for best way to structure an AI trading bot that’s a bit cost optimized would be great. What derives to use? Do you go full agent?

Thanks!

comments.author: Awkward_Attitude_719
comments.body: Ai can not trade since you can not give Ai live data however Ai can give signals probabilities.. you can connect Ai with server… server will give data to Ai for calculations n Ai will give opinion to server n that server will automate it…

comments.author: StevenVinyl
comments.body:
AI can trade, you just need the right platform lol. Cod3x already trades with AI, it's the definition of vibetrading.   
[https://www.cod3x.org/](https://www.cod3x.org/)
